name: Un utilisateur non authentifié est redirigé vers la page de connexion lorsqu'il tente d'accéder aux routes protégées

retries.statusDetails:
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed

Expected pattern: /^(.*)\/sign-in(.*)$/
Received string:  "http://paymium.local:3000/deposit/BCIO"
Timeout: 30000ms

Call log:
  - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 30000ms
    33 × unexpected value "http://paymium.local:3000/deposit/BCIO"

items.statusDetails:
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed

Expected pattern: /\/sign-in\?redirect=%2Fprofile%2Fiban/
Received string:  "http://paymium.local:3000/sign-in?redirect=%2Fprofile%2Fidentity"
Timeout: 10000ms

Call log:
  - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 10000ms
    12 × unexpected value "http://paymium.local:3000/sign-in?redirect=%2Fprofile%2Fidentity"
